transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
I prepared a challenge for today's mukbang
As you already know, I'm not good at eating spicy food
I'm going to take some antacid and do the one chip paqui challenge
Since I'm really bad with spicy food,
I'm going to take a piece
And if I'm okay after 1 minute,
I'll eat the rest and do a 5-minute timer
5 minutes!
I can do it
What's the timer at? 3 more minutes
I'm so sad
My eyes are getting watery
This is crazy
1 minute
Time is going by so slow

Help me
Time is going by so slow
Where is it?
My tongue is shaking
Wrong way
It got spicier
My tongue
I'm not eating anymore
If I don't have the ice cream in my mouth for even a split second,
What else is going to help?
Ice cream only helps temporarily
Oil? Did someone say oil?
Mayonnaise?
It's not coming out
This is not alcohol It's sesame oil
Spoon

What is this?
It got better
I'm sweating so much
Since I might not feel good tomorrow
Food mukbang is the best
Bon appetit It's still spicy
This is aglio e olio
Rosé risotto
Gambas al ajillo, cream rice cake, french fries, mushroom burger, regular burger
Cheddar dipping sauce for the fries
Cheese is cooling everything down
I have 1 more set of french fries over there
This is spicy?
What is this?
Cream rice cake
It's so delicious

Gambas al ajillo
Rosé risotto
So good
Cream rice cake tastes so good
Yummy
It looks like it will explode
That chip is not for humans
It's the devil's chip
I heard there's something spicier than that
I feel like I still have some residue on my fingers
Maybe not, since I already washed my hands
This is so tasty
I'm not going to eat spicy food ever again
That was so painful
Thanks everyone~
